overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired covered market street. The player starts at a food stall with a vendor cooking, then proceeds through the neon-lit commercial area with holographic advertisements and scattered pedestrians.

events.description: large dragon statue temporarily blocks view as camera passes the food stall

agents.ego_description: starting at a food stall and walking forward past the vendor into the market

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing conical hat cooking at food stall with steam rising

entered.detail: long metal counter with cooking equipment and ornate containers
large ceramic jars with orange and black patterns lined on the counter
intricate black dragon sculpture on the right side of the stall
industrial metal columns supporting the overhead market structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a food stall in a covered cyberpunk market. A vendor in a traditional conical hat cooks at a counter adorned with ornate ceramic jars and a prominent dragon statue. Steam rises from the cooking area as the camera begins moving forward, passing the large dragon sculpture which temporarily occludes the view.

events.description: exits the tight food stall area into the wider covered market street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market street past storefronts

entered.detail: store with illuminated LOTS signage and OPEN sign visible
elevated metal walkway structure spanning across the market ceiling
large holographic advertisements with blue and orange neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Leaving the food stall behind, the camera enters a wider covered market street lined with storefronts. The LOTS store is visible on the left with neon signage, while overhead metal walkways and support structures span the ceiling. The street is relatively empty with scattered litter on the concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market intersection with overhead signage

events.description: passing under the large PURE OVERKILL overhead sign structure

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market passing under prominent overhead signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking across the market street

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading PURE OVERKILL with neon graphics spanning overhead
market stall with clothing racks and hanging garments
vertical neon arrow indicators pointing directions

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds deeper into the market passing under the prominent PURE OVERKILL overhead sign. A clothing stall stands in the center of the walkway while more pedestrians appear in the distance. The environment features dense neon signage and metal framework overhead, with scattered papers littering the concrete ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an intimate food stall into the expansive, neon-lit corridors of a futuristic covered market. It begins at a cooking counter where steam rises around a vendor in a conical hat and ornate ceramic jars, moving forward past a large dragon sculpture that briefly obscures the view. As the camera leaves the stall, the space opens into a wider street lined with storefronts like the neon-signed LOTS store, beneath a ceiling of heavy metal walkways and support structures. The scene then proceeds deeper into the market, passing under a prominent PURE OVERKILL overhead sign and moving past a central clothing stall. Finally, the perspective pushes further into the dense urban environment, where scattered litter on the concrete ground leads toward distant pedestrians under a canopy of glowing signage and metal frameworks.
